title: LRC - JUIT
content: Expert Services Subject Support It includes  details of journals, books, databases, software, web servers, online theses,  open access software, patent information, e-books, video lectures, link to  different specialised centres engaged in specialised activities, tutorials for  searching within journals and other useful links.
